narrative:
Fairfield Twp 16 (precinct in Butler County) has 795 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.9 percentage points.
